Rotate PDF

Rotate every page in a PDF by 90°, 180°, or 270°. Free, open source, and self-hostable.

Open the Rotate PDF tool

How it works

  1. Drop your PDF into the tool.
  2. Run the rotate pdf action — no signup required.
  3. Download the result. Files stay on your infrastructure when self-hosted.

Why Stirling-PDF

  • Free and open source.
  • Self-hostable — your files never leave your network.
  • 56+ PDF tools across 5 categories.

Related tools

  • Merge PDFs
  • Split PDF
  • Remove Pages
  • Rearrange Pages
Stirling-PDF — Free & Open Source
